text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 128 

GAP_INPP_COINS_AVG_1M 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Preferred Pharmacy Average Expected Coinsurance for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using an in-network preferred pharmacy (INPP) during the coverage 
gap phase of the Part D benefit other supply.
